metadata.title: Acme Health Patient Intake API — SOC 2 GRC Baseline

components.title: acme-health-intake
components.description: Patient Intake API built on AWS Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and S3. Processes PHI. GRC baseline wraps the starter with KMS encryption, TLS enforcement, versioning, least-privilege IAM, and API access logging.
components.purpose: Accept and store patient intake submissions for Acme Health telehealth platform.

control-implementations.description: SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria implemented by this system. Mapped to NIST 800-53 Rev 5 as the authoritative catalog.

implemented-requirements.description: GAP-01 and GAP-02 closed. S3 uploads bucket encrypted with customer-managed KMS key via aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration with sse_algorithm=aws:kms. DynamoDB submissions table encrypted with same CMK via server_side_encryption block. Key rotation enabled. Maps to SOC 2 CC6.1.

links.text: Signed pipeline evidence bundle — plan.json and conftest-results.json.

implemented-requirements.description: GAP-03 closed. S3 uploads bucket policy denies all requests where aws:SecureTransport is false. PHI cannot be transmitted over non-TLS connections. Maps to SOC 2 CC6.7.
